data.name: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp.
data.description: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp., a real estate investment trust (REIT), focuses on the origination, holding, and management of commercial real estate mortgage loans and equity investments in commercial real estate property in the United States. data.name: Adamas Trust, Inc.
data.description: Adamas Trust, Inc. acquires, invests in, finances, and manages mortgage-related single-family and multifamily residential assets in the United States. The company operates through two segments: Investment Portfolio and Constructive.
